name: Gilbert Gottfried
bio: Gilbert Gottfried was an American stand-up comedian and actor known for an exaggerated, shrill, squinting delivery and aggressively crude, taboo-pushing material. Alongside his edgy stand-up he had a prolific voice-acting career, most famously as Iago in Disneys Aladdin and as the Aflac duck. He was known for the contrast between his filthy live act and his work in childrens entertainment.

timeline.ev: Joins the cast of Saturday Night Live for one season
Launches Gilbert Gottfrieds Amazing Colossal Podcast

accolades: Voiced Iago in the Aladdin franchise and the Aflac duck mascot
